fragment:
<set-variable name="selected-backend" value="@{
		var apiType = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("api-type", "openai");
		var modelId = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("model-id", "unknown");
		var models = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("config-models");
		var apiTypes = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("config-api-types");
		
		var apiTypeBackend = apiTypes?[apiType]?["backend"]?.ToString();
		if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(apiTypeBackend)) {
			return apiTypeBackend;
		}
		
		var modelBackend = models?[modelId]?["backend"]?.ToString();
		if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(modelBackend)) {
			return modelBackend;
		}
		
		return string.Empty;
	}" />
	
	
		<when condition="@(string.IsNullOrEmpty(context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("selected-backend")))">
			
				@($"UAIG - Backend not configured for model {context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("model-id", "not-set")} with API type {context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("api-type", "not-set")}")
			
			
				
				
					application/json
				
				Backend not configured for the requested model or API type.
			
		
	
	
	
	<set-backend-service backend-id="@(context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("selected-backend"))" />
	
	
		<when condition="@(context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("api-type", string.Empty).Equals("geminiopenai", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase))">
			
				@("Bearer " + "{{Gemini-ApiKey}}")
			
		
	
	
		@($"UAIG - Backend {context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("selected-backend", "not-set")} selected for model {context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("model-id", "not-set")} with API type {context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("api-type", "not-set")}")
